title: Miden Debug Configuration
description: Configuration for the Miden VM DAP debug adapter exposed by `miden-client` or `miden-debug`.

request.description: `launch` spawns a Miden debug backend and connects; `attach` connects to a server you started yourself.

runtime.description: Launch backend. Use `client` for miden-client transaction debugging, or `debugger` for standalone miden-debug sessions.

scriptPath.description: Path to the transaction `.masm` script to debug with miden-client. Relative paths are resolved from `cwd`.

programPath.description: Path to a standalone `.masm` source file or compiled `.masp` package to debug with miden-debug. Relative paths are resolved from `cwd`.

midenClientPath.description: Path to the `miden-client` binary for `runtime: "client"`. When omitted, `miden-client` is resolved from `$PATH`.

midenDebugPath.description: Path to the `miden-debug` binary for `runtime: "debugger"`. When omitted, `miden-debug` is resolved from `$PATH`.

pythonPath.description: Path to Python 3 used by the Zed stdio proxy. When omitted, `python3` is resolved from `$PATH`.

accountId.description: Account ID for miden-client transaction execution (optional).

inputsPath.description: Path to a miden-debug inputs TOML file for standalone debugger launches.

entrypoint.description: Entrypoint to call when programPath points at a library package.

programArgs.description: Operand stack arguments for standalone debugger launches.

sysroot.description: Miden sysroot for standalone debugger launches.

searchPath.description: Additional library search paths for standalone debugger launches.

linkLibraries.description: Libraries to pass to miden-debug with --link-library.

sourcePathPrefixes.description: Explicit source path prefixes used to map paths produced by the compiler's -Ztrim-path-prefix option.

trimPathPrefixes.description: Compiler -Ztrim-path-prefix values. The extension forwards these as source path prefixes to miden-debug.

compilerArgs.description: Compiler arguments to scan for -Ztrim-path-prefix values when launching miden-debug.

midencArgs.description: Alias for compiler arguments to scan for -Ztrim-path-prefix values.

buildArgs.description: Alias for build arguments to scan for -Ztrim-path-prefix values.

cargoMidenArgs.description: Alias for cargo-miden arguments to scan for -Ztrim-path-prefix values.

cwd.description: Working directory for the launched debug backend. Relative paths are resolved from the worktree root. Defaults to the worktree root.
